summary: Senior Frontend Angular Developer with 4+ years architecting and delivering enterprise-grade web applications for government and financial sectors. Specialized in scalable, high-performance SPAs using Angular (v13–v22), TypeScript and RxJS — serving 10,000+ users across three countries with measurable outcomes like 50% performance gains and 40% API optimization.

work.description: Building an AI-driven web analytics application — a dynamic Angular frontend consuming REST APIs and integrating ML models for predictive insights and intelligent decision-making.

Engineered government portals & enterprise systems serving 10,000+ users across three countries — Fiji Immigration System, PRIMS pension platform and cross-platform mobile apps. Reduced API consumption 40% and boosted performance 50%.

achievements.title: Fiji Immigration Portal
achievements.description: Owned the full frontend architecture for a national immigration platform, earning client commendation for UI and performance

achievements.title: Angular Signals Adoption
achievements.description: Led the team's migration to Angular Signals and standalone components for faster, more maintainable UIs

achievements.title: Performance Optimization
achievements.description: Cut API consumption by 40% and improved load performance by 50% through RxJS and rendering optimizations

achievements.title: Cross-Platform Mobile
achievements.description: Shipped iOS & Android provident-fund apps with biometric auth and offline support via Ionic + Capacitor

projectHighlights.title: Fiji Immigration Portal
projectHighlights.description: Secure citizen self-service portal for visas, permits and citizenship — with document uploads, payments and role-based workflows.

projectHighlights.title: VNPF Mobile App
projectHighlights.description: Cross-platform provident-fund app with biometric authentication, real-time balances and offline-capable member services.

projectHighlights.title: PRIMS Pension Portal
projectHighlights.description: Self-service pension platform giving members real-time access to contributions, benefit statements and claim submissions.

suggestions: Quantify your achievements using numbers and metrics.

Highlight your most recent and impactful work.
